ability: 如果你死亡，恶魔会得知这一消息。从现在起，恶魔每晚可以查看魔典。
otherNightReminder: If the Messenger is dead, wake the Demon. If this is the first night that the Messenger has been dead, show the Demon the "THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU" card & the Messenger's character token. Then, show the Demon the Grimoire.
flavor: M'lord, I was told to give you this.
